title: VIEW WITH DEFINER -> Distributed -> MergeTree does not propagate correct user (propagate initial user instead of definer user for shards)
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
If view is using DEFINER, it seems wrong user (initial_user) is being propagated to Distributed table shards, so this renders definer non working.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
cluster is using secret in remote_servers, repro on 25.3
```sql
CREATE TABLE d3.t1
(
`id` UInt32,
`value` String
)
ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{uuid}/{shard}', '{replica}')
ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE d3.t1_dist
(
`id` UInt32,
`value` String
)
ENGINE = Distributed('cluster', 'd3', 't1', rand());
CREATE VIEW d3.v1
(
`id` UInt32,
`value` String
)
DEFINER = default SQL SECURITY DEFINER
AS SELECT
id,
value
FROM d3.t1
WHERE id < 5;
CREATE VIEW d3.v2
(
`id` UInt32,
`value` String
)
DEFINER = default SQL SECURITY DEFINER
AS SELECT
id,
value
FROM d3.t1_dist
WHERE id < 5;
```
```sql
GRANT SHOW, REMOTE ON *.* TO test_user;
GRANT SELECT ON d3.v1 TO test_user;
GRANT SELECT ON d3.v2 TO test_user;
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d3.t2 (id UInt32, value Nullable(String), timestamp DateTime DEFAULT now()) ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/oceanbase/tables/{uuid}/{shard}', '{replica}');
CREATE TABLE d3.t2_dist (id UInt32, value Nullable(String), timestamp DateTime DEFAULT now()) ENGINE = Distributed('cluster', 'd3', 't2', rand());
CREATE VIEW d3.v3 AS SELECT id, COALESCE(value, 'default_value') AS value FROM d3.t2 WHERE id >= 10;
CREATE VIEW d3.v4 AS SELECT id, CONCAT(value, '_suffix') AS value FROM d3.t2_dist WHERE timestamp < NOW() - INTERVAL '1' DAY;
INSERT INTO d3.t2 (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test_value'), (2, NULL), (3, 'another_value');
key_bug_features: Incorrect user propagation in Distributed table shards
